dbEquipBonuses.name: Leader's Vitality
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 1000 Maximum Hit Points for each player in your team.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Pioneer (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: You gain an increased stat for each party member. Party of 1: +200 Power. 2: +400 Power+Defense. 3: +400 Power+Defense+Accuracy. 4: +800 Power+Defense+Accuracy+Critical Strike. 5: +800 Power+Defense+Accuracy+Critical Strike+Critical Severity.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Butcher's Remedy
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 3% of your health back.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Primal (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: If you are hit or healed for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, your Base Damage Boost and Overall Outgoing Healing are increased by 10% for 10 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Undermountain Hunter
dbEquipBonuses.description: +5% Damage in the Undermountain

dbEquipBonuses.name: Renegade's Stamina
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you Deflect an attack, gain 2% Stamina Regeneration for 10 seconds. Max 5 Stacks: 10% Stamina Regeneration.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Warden's Stamina
dbEquipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 0.5% Stamina Regeneration and 0.35% Awareness. Max Stacks: 7 (10 in Wildspace).

dbEquipBonuses.name: Warden's Stamina
dbEquipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, gain 0.4% Stamina Regeneration and 0.8% Awareness. Max 10 Stacks: 4% Stamina Regeneration and 8% Awareness.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Channeler's Focus
dbEquipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 0.4% Outgoing Healing and 0.4% Power. Max 10 Stacks: 4% Outgoing Healing and 4% Power.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Boar's Determination
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you are damaged for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 7.5% Awareness and 5% Stamina Regeneration for 10 seconds. (15 second cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Divine Word
dbEquipBonuses.description: Slightly increased threat generation.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Gladiator's Accuracy
dbEquipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 100 Accuracy. If you stay in combat for longer than 2 minutes, this ability will no longer be active.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Battle Acumen
dbEquipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, gain +0.4% Awareness and +0.5% Critical Avoidance. You lose all stacks if you leave combat. Max 10 Stacks: 4% Awareness and 5% Critical Avoidance.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Renewed Spirit
dbEquipBonuses.description: Your Divinity regenerates 25% faster.
